location: Very rare drop from the masked, dancing Celebrants of Dominula, Windmill Village — best odds come from the two yellow-coated Celebrants in the large group midway between the Windmill Village and Windmill Heights grace sites.
tactics: Celebrants dance and twirl unpredictably before lunging in — their sickle-wielding cousins look nearly identical, so check the weapon before committing if you're farming this specific drop
Drop rate is very low (about 0.5%), so plan on many resets and stack Item Discovery gear
The two yellow-coated Celebrants in the big group between Windmill Village and Windmill Heights are the confirmed carriers of this weapon
A giant windmill sail sweeps through part of the village and can knock you around mid-fight — stay aware of its position
lore: A rake wrapped in colorful fabric and fashioned from bone, used as a festival prop by Windmill Village's dancers rather than as a weapon of war — a strike with it skims off a trickle of runes.

builds.name: Low-investment Dex poke
builds.why: Only 8 Strength / 14 Dexterity needed for D-scaling in both, making it a cheap early spear with a built-in Barbaric Roar skill
